mapper.sql: id, room_id, title, content, priority, status, assignee_student_id, creator_student_id, due_time, start_time, completed_time, completed_by, cancel_reason, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delflag
mapper.select: select r.id as roomId, b.room_num as buildingNum, r.room_num as roomNum, count(t.id) as totalCount, coalesce(sum(case when t.status = 0 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as pendingCount, coalesce(sum(case when t.status = 1 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as processingCount, coalesce(sum(case when t.status = 2 and t.completed_time >= #{weekStart} and t.completed_time < #{weekEnd} then 1 else 0 end), 0) as weekCompletedCount from room_student rs left join dormitory r on r.id = rs.room_id and r.delflag = 0 left join dormitory b on b.id = r.parent_id and b.delflag = 0 left join dm_todo t on t.room_id = r.id and t.delflag = 0 where rs.student_id = #{studentId} and rs.is_current = 1 group by r.id, b.room_num, r.room_num

select t.id, t.title, t.content, t.priority, t.status, t.assignee_student_id as assigneeStudentId, ua.real_name as assigneeName, t.creator_student_id as creatorStudentId, uc.real_name as creatorName, t.due_time as dueTime, t.start_time as startTime, t.completed_time as completedTime, t.completed_by as completedBy, ub.real_name as completedByName, t.cancel_reason as cancelReason from dm_todo t left join user_student ua on ua.id = t.assignee_student_id and ua.delflag = 0 left join user_student uc on uc.id = t.creator_student_id and uc.delflag = 0 left join user_student ub on ub.id = t.completed_by and ub.delflag = 0 where t.id = #{id} and t.room_id = #{roomId} and t.delflag = 0 limit 1

select rs.student_id as value, us.real_name as label from room_student rs join user_student us on us.id = rs.student_id and us.delflag = 0 where rs.room_id = #{roomId} and rs.is_current = 1 order by us.real_name
